creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just as general advice: When using ZFS inside VirtualBox, make sure to disable IgnoreFlush, otherwise FS corruption can happen quite easily:

  VBoxManage setextradata VM-name "VBoxInternal/Devices/piix3ide/0/LUN#[x]/Config/IgnoreFlush" 0
  VBoxManage setextradata VM-name "VBoxInternal/Devices/ahci/0/LUN#[x]/Config/IgnoreFlush" 0

With x being the LUN number, so e.g.,

  VBoxManage setextradata VM-name "VBoxInternal/Devices/ahci/0/LUN#[0]/Config/IgnoreFlush" 0

See also:
https://www.virtualbox.org/manual/ch12.html#ts_ide-sata-flush
